description: Founder profile settings (personal, security, platform config) and team management with new admin invite modal

founder-profile.description: Personal information, security (2FA), and platform-wide settings (commission, fees, toggles, email templates)

founder-teams.description: Team overview dashboard with KPIs and new admin account creation modal

notes: Founder nav adds Teams alongside standard admin links
Profile sidebar shows permission checklist (User Management, Financial Reporting, Farm Verification, System Configuration)
Platform Settings tab centralizes commission rates, security toggles, and notification preferences
New Admin modal includes role level, granular permissions, and 24-hour invite expiry notice
